Featured Solutions

Business Central and modern web solutions presented as product-ready use cases.

Business Central Extension

Employee Asset Tracking Module

A custom Business Central extension designed to help organisations manage asset lifecycle processes within the ERP environment, combining business workflow thinking with practical AL implementation.

Business CentralALReportingWorkflow

Web Application

Online Examination Portal

A full-featured web-based examination system built in PHP that allows administrators to create and manage online tests while students take timed assessments from any browser — no installation required.

PHPWebAssessment
